mapper.select: SELECT PLANNER_ID , WS_ID , TITLE , PARTICIPANTS , COLOR , CAL_YEAR , CAL_MONTH , ITINERARY , UPDT_DT FROM PLANNER WHERE WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY REGIST_DT DESC
SELECT PLANNER_ID , WS_ID , TITLE , PARTICIPANTS , COLOR , CAL_YEAR , CAL_MONTH , ITINERARY , UPDT_DT FROM PLANNER WHERE PLANNER_ID = #{plannerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
